name: Pink Crustacean Cheese Biscuits
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Mix the Bisquick, cold water, and grated Cheddar cheese in a large bowl until combined.
3. Drop spoonfuls of the dough onto a greased baking sheet.
4. Bake for 8-10 minutes in the preheated oven.
5. Remove the biscuits from the oven while hot and brush with melted butter or margarine mixed with garlic powder, parsley flakes, and Italian seasonings. Adjust the amounts based on batch size; a little goes a long way.
6. Serve immediately.
